Domain Expertise + Building with AI Is the New Baseline

Learn how to use your domain expertise with AI tools to build real products — through blog posts, live presentations, and hands-on resources.

Our Products

B

Blocks Builder AI

Build AI-powered applications visually with drag-and-drop blocks. Create, customize, and deploy intelligent workflows without writing code.

Explore ↗
C

Cody Product Builder

Turn ideas into clear, buildable plans using AI. Works inside your AI coding tools and keeps you, your team, and your AI assistant in sync without stifling creativity.

Explore ↗
C

Cody Article Writer

Create research-backed articles with customizable style guides and citations. Guides you through topic ideation, research planning, outlining, and section-by-section writing.

Explore ↗
